name: Vienna Villas - Prime Location Between Seminyak & Canggu
Canggu Lifestyle: Stylish 2 Bedroom Villa near Cafés & Beaches
Villa Putih Susu
description:
Discover the perfect blend of elegance and tropical comfort at this modern villa, just minutes from Bali's best beaches and attractions. Enjoy sunny days by the pool or relaxed meals under the stars in your tranquil outdoor dining space.

What you'll get: 3 beautifully appointed bedrooms with ensuite bathrooms, a fully equipped kitchen and dining area, an enclosed living room with a Smart TV, a private swimming pool, and a private parking area.

Monthly rate IDR 30,000,000, or yearly at IDR 375,000,000 (villa only), plus a refundable security deposit of 10%. Includes cleaning twice per week, weekly pool maintenance, linen change and waste disposal. Excludes electricity and water (based on usage), personal consumption (laundry, amenities, drinking water) and additional services.

Prime location in Ungasan: Garuda Wisnu Kencana (GWK) Cultural Park 4.5 km, Melasti Beach 5.8 km, Uluwatu Temple 10.5 km, Jimbaran Beach seafood cafes 6.5 km, El Kabron Cliff Club 8.7 km, Sundays Beach Club 6.2 km, Sidewalk Jimbaran Mall 4.2 km, Ngurah Rai International Airport 15 km.

name: Villa Eysteinn
description:
Seeking an idyllic long-term escape in Bali? Experience Villa Eysteinn, a stunning blend of contemporary design and authentic Balinese comfort, perfectly situated in vibrant Canggu.

What you'll get: 3 bedrooms with private bathrooms, elegant modern interiors, a private pool surrounded by a serene lush garden, and a fully equipped chef's kitchen.

Monthly rate IDR 40,000,000, or yearly at IDR 365,000,000 (villa only, no inclusions). Monthly includes cleaning twice per week, weekly pool maintenance, linen change and waste disposal. Excludes electricity and water (based on usage), personal consumption (laundry, amenities, drinking water) and additional services.

Prime location on Jalan Kayu Tulang, Canggu: Pepito Market Batu Bolong 0.5 km, Batu Bolong Beach 2.8 km, La Brisa Bali (Echo Beach) 3.1 km, Atlas Beach Club and FINNS 4.0 km, Ngurah Rai International Airport 11 km. Surrounded by cafes, shops and wellness centres.

name: Olivia Sanur Workstay Suites
description:
Olivia Sanur Workstay Suites offers the ultimate blend of productivity and relaxation, featuring quiet, dedicated workspaces and high-speed internet designed specifically for digital nomads.

What you'll get: bedrooms with private en-suite bathrooms and shower, Smart TV, high-speed Wi-Fi, integrated workspaces, refreshing social spaces, and a public kitchen and sharing pool.

Monthly rates: Loft Quadruple Rooms (spacious lofts with 2 comfortable beds) from IDR 10,000,000 NETT, and Deluxe Rooms from IDR 5,000,000 NETT, plus a refundable security deposit of 10%. Includes cleaning twice per week, electricity, linen change, waste disposal and public pantry access. Excludes personal consumption (laundry, amenities, drinking water) and additional services.

Prime location in Sanur Kauh: Sanur Beach 1.4 km, Sindhu Night Market 1.9 km, Massimo Italian Restaurant 2.1 km, Icon Bali Mall 2.2 km, Mertasari Beach 2.5 km, Sanur Harbour 3.2 km, Ngurah Rai International Airport 12 km.

name: Baile Bali Villa
description:
Experience the perfect blend of modern design and Balinese charm at this brand-new 2-bedroom minimalist villa, located in the secure Kompleks Dharma Village, Jimbaran. Ideal for families, couples or small groups, this private villa offers comfort, style and convenience for up to 4 guests.

Villa highlights: 2 bedrooms with Smart TVs; a master bedroom with a private ensuite bathroom and shower; a second bedroom with a dedicated private bathroom and shower located just outside the room's entrance; a minimalist and modern design in a secure complex; a private swimming pool; a cozy living room with a Smart TV and direct pool access; a fully equipped kitchen; and complimentary Netflix and YouTube access in the living room.

Only IDR 28,000,000 NETT per month. Inclusions: Wi-Fi, housekeeping twice per week, weekly pool maintenance, weekly linen and towel change, Banjar and garbage fees. Exclusions: electricity and water (based on usage), cooking gas, personal laundry and personal consumption.

Prime and strategic location in Jimbaran: easy access by car or motorbike from the main road, Ngurah Rai International Airport 7 km (about 20 minutes), minutes from Pepito Supermarket, McDonald's, KFC and Jimbaran Sidewalk Mall, close to Kedonganan and Kelan Beach, and a short drive to Nusa Dua, GWK and other popular destinations.

name: Villa Rumma Lanna
description:
Inspired by the timeless charm of Ubud's peaceful lifestyle, Villa Rumma Lanna invites you to a 2-bedroom private haven where the iconic Balinese landscape meets modern elegance. Boasting an uninterrupted 360 degree panorama, this is more than just a stay; it is an immersion into the soul of Ubud.

What you'll get: a panoramic viewing lounge; 360 degree living with rice field and sunrise sanctuary; each bedroom with a queen bed and dedicated workspace; a master suite with a rice field sanctuary view; a ground floor suite with Smart TV and direct steps to the pool; and a fully equipped open kitchen.

Monthly rate IDR 25,000,000 NETT plus a refundable security deposit of 10%. Includes weekly cleaning, pool and gardener service, linen change and waste disposal. Excludes electricity and water (based on usage), personal consumption (laundry, amenities, drinking water) and additional services.

Prime location in Singakerta, Ubud: Ubud Center (Ubud Palace and Market) approximately 4 km, Ubud Monkey Forest approximately 3.5 km, Goa Gajah (Elephant Cave) approximately 4 km, Campuhan Ridge Walk approximately 5 km, Tegalalang Rice Terrace approximately 12 km, Ngurah Rai International Airport (DPS) approximately 40 km.

name: Secluded Jungle Sanctuary for Couple
description:
This cozy cottage is designed for those seeking a peaceful escape without sacrificing modern comfort. It is a serene haven where the only sounds are the symphony of nature: the melodic songs of tropical birds, the gentle rustle of leaves in the breeze, and the distant calls of Balinese wildlife.

What you'll get: 1 bedroom with a private ensuite bathroom, plus a kitchenette and an enclosed living area with a Smart TV.

Monthly rate IDR 10,000,000 plus a refundable security deposit of 10%. Includes cleaning twice per week, electricity, weekly pool maintenance, linen change and waste disposal. Excludes personal consumption (laundry, amenities, drinking water) and additional services.

Prime location in Sebatu, Ubud: Tirta Empul Holy Water Temple 5.6 km, Tegallalang Rice Terrace 6.2 km, Ubud Center 17.3 km, Kintamani Highlands 19.6 km.

name: Askana Suites Payangan
description:
Escape to a tranquil sanctuary at our boutique loft suites, perfectly situated in Payangan, just minutes away from Novotel Resort Ubud. This property offers a seamless blend of modern living and the lush, tropical beauty of Gianyar.

What you'll get: a 1-bedroom loft mezzanine design, Wi-Fi with a 55-inch Smart TV, a convenient kitchenette, sharing pool and garden access, a reachable and strategic location, and spacious parking for both cars and motorcycles.

Monthly rate IDR 8,500,000 plus a refundable security deposit of 10%. Includes cleaning twice per week, weekly pool maintenance, electricity, linen change and waste disposal. Excludes personal consumption (laundry, amenities, drinking water) and additional services.

Nearby in Payangan: Mason Elephant Park & Lodge approximately 3.4 km, Tegalalang Rice Terrace approximately 8.5 km, Alas Harum Bali approximately 8.7 km, Tirta Empul Temple approximately 13 km, Campuhan Ridge Walk approximately 14.5 km, Ubud Central (Market and Palace) approximately 15 km, Kintamani (Batur View Point) approximately 20 km, Ngurah Rai International Airport approximately 49.7 km.

name: The Twenty Eight
description:
An all-inclusive sanctuary in Ungasan, perfect for short stays and digital nomads. Our cozy 1-bedroom features a shared kitchen and a peaceful work environment. Enjoy a hassle-free, move-in-ready home just minutes from South Bali's best white-sand beaches.

What you'll get: a high-quality mattress for a restful night's sleep, fully air-conditioned rooms, a private bathroom with a modern shower, toilet and fresh towels, a private parking area, and a group-friendly setup.

Standard room soft-opening offer. Monthly rate IDR 5,500,000, or yearly at IDR 60,000,000, plus a refundable security deposit of 10%. Includes cleaning once per week, electricity, linen change and waste disposal. Excludes personal consumption (laundry, amenities, drinking water) and additional services.

Prime location in Ungasan: Melasti Beach approximately 4.2 km, Green Bowl Beach approximately 4.5 km, Pandawa Beach approximately 5.8 km, GWK Cultural Park approximately 3.5 km, Uluwatu Temple approximately 9 km, I Gusti Ngurah Rai International Airport (DPS) approximately 13.5 km.

name: Sakha Sari Villa
description:
Designer Canggu retreat. This architecturally striking villa in desirable Padonan blends bohemian chic with bold tribal accents.

Villa features: 3 bedrooms with private en-suite bathrooms, an enclosed living area with a Smart TV, a private swimming pool, a fully equipped kitchen, direct garden and pool access from all bedrooms, and a dedicated in-villa massage room.

Launch exclusive rate. Monthly IDR 35,000,000, or yearly at IDR 385,000,000 (villa only), plus a security deposit of 10% from the rate. Monthly inclusions: cleaning twice per week, high-speed Wi-Fi, weekly pool and gardener service, weekly linen change, waste disposal and Banjar fee. Exclusions: electricity, personal consumption and daily housekeeping (available at extra cost).

Prime location on Jalan Padonan, Canggu: Berawa (Finns Beach Club, Atlas Beach Fest) 5.5 km, Pererenan Beach 5 km, Canggu Center (Batu Bolong and Echo Beach) 6 km, Seminyak (shopping and dining) 8 km, Ngurah Rai International Airport (DPS) 16.5 km.

name: Puri Bagus Legian
description:
Experience elegance in the heart of Legian. A peaceful sanctuary for families and groups, our villa offers sophisticated interiors and a tranquil escape, all while keeping Legian's best hotspots just moments away.

What you'll get: 3 bedrooms with private ensuite bathrooms, spacious air-conditioned bedrooms, bright living areas, a private terrace and balcony, a fully equipped kitchen and dining area, a Smart TV with Netflix access and a premium soundbar, plus a mini-bar and work desk.

Monthly rate IDR 55,000,000 plus a refundable security deposit of 10%. Includes cleaning twice per week, weekly pool maintenance, linen change and waste disposal. Excludes electricity and water (based on usage), personal consumption (laundry, amenities, drinking water) and additional services.

Prime location in Legian: Legian Street (nightlife and shopping) 500 m, Ground Zero Monument 900 m, Kuta Beach 1.1 km, Beachwalk Shopping Center 1.8 km, Waterbom Bali 2.1 km, Seminyak area 3.5 km, Ngurah Rai Airport (DPS) 6.5 km.

name: Amalfi Dream Villa
description:
Experience the pinnacle of Jimbaran in this brand-new 130 sqm architectural gem. Featuring sleek minimalist design and sun-drenched spaces, it is perfectly crafted for high-end holidays or productive long-term stays.

What you'll get: 2 bedrooms with en-suite bathrooms, a private swimming pool with a lounge area, a spacious living and dining area with modern furnishings, a fully equipped kitchen, Smart TV, high-speed Wi-Fi and air conditioning in all rooms, plus a secure parking area.

Monthly rate IDR 28,000,000 NETT plus a refundable security deposit of 10%. Includes cleaning twice per week, weekly pool and gardener service, linen change and waste disposal. Excludes electricity and water (based on usage), personal consumption (laundry, amenities, drinking water) and additional services.

Prime location in Puri Gading, Jimbaran: local cafes and boutiques 1 to 2 km, GWK Cultural Park 2.5 km, Balangan, Dreamland and Jimbaran Bay beaches 3 to 5 km, Ngurah Rai International Airport 12 km (about 25 minutes).
